name: Aditya Patel
intro: Software engineer focused on building scalable backend systems, cloud-native applications, and clean developer-first digital experiences.
summary: Passionate about transforming ideas into production-ready software by working across backend development, APIs, databases, cloud infrastructure, and modern web technologies with a strong focus on performance, scalability, and usability.

experience.description:
• Developing and maintaining enterprise-grade applications using .NET, ASP.NET, C#, and Microsoft SQL Server.
  • Designing and implementing scalable backend functionalities, RESTful APIs, and database-driven solutions for business applications.
  • Collaborating with cross-functional teams in agile development environments to deliver high-quality software solutions.
  • Performing debugging, performance optimization, and database management to improve application reliability and efficiency.
  • Following software development best practices including version control, code reviews, and structured testing workflows.

• Completed intensive training in .NET development with focus on scalable and enterprise-level software applications.
  • Worked with ASP.NET, C#, and Microsoft SQL Server to build and understand backend application workflows.
  • Collaborated with mentors and development teams to gain practical exposure to software engineering processes and agile methodologies.
  • Developed hands-on experience in debugging, database operations, API integration, and application development practices.
  • Strengthened understanding of object-oriented programming, software architecture, and database management concepts.

projects.name: Portfolio
projects.description: A minimal personal site built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
